data.proposal_1: Unified SSE Stream Metadata Protocol (feasibility=8, innovation=5)
data.recommendation: Implement Proposal 1 first (low risk, immediate value), then Proposal 2 (requires empirical threshold tuning)

ideas_handled.merged: IDEA-3+IDEA-7+IDEA-8 -> Unified SSE Stream Metadata Protocol
ideas_handled.refined: IDEA-2 (adaptive threshold), IDEA-4 (per-request adaptive), IDEA-5 (min-length guard), IDEA-6 (fake content removed)

proposal_2.title: Adaptive Per-Request Degradation Hints
key_benefits: Two-phase adaptive threshold reduces false positives

data.recommendation: Phase 1: Implement Proposal 1 (SSE metadata protocol) - low risk, immediate observability. Phase 2: Implement Proposal 2 (adaptive degradation) - higher complexity, needs empirical threshold tuning.
gaps: Root cause (upstream stream breaks) not fixable by this layer
Production baseline data needed for threshold tuning
